nodes.label: Spring Boot Course Guideline Requirement (Java 21 + Spring Boot microservices)
nodes.norm_label: spring boot course guideline requirement (java 21 + spring boot microservices)

nodes.label: Rationale: reuse existing FastAPI backend instead of building Spring Boot (existing working backend from a prior team project; focus effort on Flutter client)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: reuse existing fastapi backend instead of building spring boot (existing working backend from a prior team project; focus effort on flutter client)

nodes.label: Rationale: no refresh-token endpoint exists on backend; treat 8-day access token as session lifetime, re-prompt login on 401 rather than build a client-side workaround
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no refresh-token endpoint exists on backend; treat 8-day access token as session lifetime, re-prompt login on 401 rather than build a client-side workaround

nodes.label: Rationale: no audit-trail model/endpoint exists in backend; Audit Log declared out of scope, noted as future work
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no audit-trail model/endpoint exists in backend; audit log declared out of scope, noted as future work

nodes.label: Rationale: team-owner computed as teams.any(owner==currentUser) since no is_team_owner flag exists; an 'empty approvals list' heuristic was considered and rejected (would wrongly hide the nav entry for an owner with zero pending items)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: team-owner computed as teams.any(owner==currentuser) since no is_team_owner flag exists; an 'empty approvals list' heuristic was considered and rejected (would wrongly hide the nav entry for an owner with zero pending items)

nodes.label: Rationale: no self-signup screen — admins provision all accounts via Phase 8 admin Users screen, matching the existing React app
nodes.norm_label: rationale: no self-signup screen — admins provision all accounts via phase 8 admin users screen, matching the existing react app

nodes.label: Rationale: Android is the primary/demo target; Windows desktop is for fast dev-loop iteration only; iOS not built (no Mac available)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: android is the primary/demo target; windows desktop is for fast dev-loop iteration only; ios not built (no mac available)

nodes.label: Rationale: Admin CRUD (Phase 8) kept last per user decision even though it only depends on Phase 2.1 — Phases 3-7 seed test data manually via Swagger UI in the meantime
nodes.norm_label: rationale: admin crud (phase 8) kept last per user decision even though it only depends on phase 2.1 — phases 3-7 seed test data manually via swagger ui in the meantime

nodes.label: Rationale: design tokens adopted from a Figma Community HRMS reference (minimal/clean, light-first), superseding an earlier dark/indigo/pill-button/filled-input v1 direction after the reference was found to match user intent better
nodes.norm_label: rationale: design tokens adopted from a figma community hrms reference (minimal/clean, light-first), superseding an earlier dark/indigo/pill-button/filled-input v1 direction after the reference was found to match user intent better

nodes.label: Rationale: iconly icon package tried and reverted — incompatible with current Flutter's IconData being a final class; Material 'outlined' icon variants used instead
nodes.norm_label: rationale: iconly icon package tried and reverted — incompatible with current flutter's icondata being a final class; material 'outlined' icon variants used instead
